_comment: Per-NEW-crate cargo-public-api baseline per seq-minor-5. This file is the seed baseline at G14-A1 wave-4a landing time. The `cargo-public-api` workflow at `.github/workflows/public-api-regression.yml` (or its successor at G20-A3 wave-8a §7.3.A.9) will populate the structured surface entries on the next push that includes the workflow. Until then, this placeholder serves as the file-existence pin per `tests/cargo_public_api_drift_un_ignored` (G20-A3 wave-8a) + the per-NEW-crate ownership commitment.
_surfaces: pub use errors::{DidError, KeypairError, SeedImportError, UcanError}
pub struct keypair::SecretKey [Zeroize, ZeroizeOnDrop; !Clone; redacted Debug per crypto-blocker-1]
pub fn keypair::Keypair::generate() -> Self [pinned to OsRng per crypto-major-2]
pub struct ucan::UcanClaims { iss, aud, att, nbf, exp, prf }
pub fn ucan::Ucan::validate_at(&self, now: u64) -> Result<(), UcanError>
pub fn ucan::validate_chain_at(chain: &[Ucan], now: u64) -> Result<(), UcanError>
pub fn ucan::validate_chain_for_audience(chain: &[Ucan], expected: &Did) -> Result<(), UcanError>
_attribution_frame_disclosure: Per sec-r1-13: future device-DID attestation extension (G14-A2 wave-4a') will add CapabilityEnvelope + DeviceAttestation + DeviceRevocation public types. The cargo-public-api baseline regenerates at G14-A2 close to capture the additions; no breaking removal expected at G14-A2 (additive only).
